message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction

title UML Sequence Diagram

"Registry Authority [Registry Submission Definition Creator]" as Authority
"Registry Definition Repository [Registry Submission Definition Repository]" as Repository

Authority --> Authority : 1. Create submission definition artifacts.
Authority --> Repository : 2. Update submission definition artifacts.
Authority --> Authority : 3. Create submission definition artifacts.
Authority --> Repository : 4. Update submission definition artifacts.

@enduml
